name: Poppy | Your roommate is secretly a PORNSTAR?!
description:
"I-I admit, okay?! I'll do anything, just shut up about it!"

ANY! USER

You found out your roommate is actually a pornstar!

S.I.S™ : You found her in a "video" and decided to confront her about it, but found her in her room taking photos of herself

✨Art/Image credits : @milky goober

🛎️Requested by : @TheUltimateComedicGenius

(Prompt : "poppy dandys world. any scenario just gimme the bubble")

🎶Song : P*RNSTAR - Nessa Barrett

(YT LINK)

If you're wondering; "Where's the usual spacing between texts?" there's NONE. Absolutely none.

Why? Because for some reason, I can no longer copy paste the hex code for the colors I usually use. And I spent like 40 minutes trying to pick the usual colors and can't even find them.

FUCKKK

Absolutely hate it. Makes me super demotivated to even make a bot.

I've been mad about this for 2 days holy shit.

Don't worry, I did not downgrade this bot despite fuming about this.

Expect next of my bots to have barely any colored text.

The only thing keeping me motivated is the fact I have to do this bot.

^(Did not hate making this bot at all)

🚨NOTE : My bots are tested with JLLM ONLY! Any other APIs are NOT GUARANTEED to work optimally.

NOTE 2 : If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or repeats words, it's the API's fault. Simply edit the message or choose different ones.

NOTE 3 : If the bot gives you a response that isn't in your liking, edit it or choose different ones.

All characters are depicted as 18+
creator: GrayMiko
